calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Compelling The Trustee Regarding Allocation Of Trustee'S Fees, Attorneys' Fees, Accountants' Fees And Investment Advisory Fees
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lee L. Kaster for Lisa C. Appelbaum, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Mary G. Sancimino for Debora Chait, Respondent (via Zoom).

The Court first addressed the issue of venue and determined that San Francisco County is the appropriate venue. Mr. Kaster argued that the trustee improperly allocated all administrative expenses lacks the discretion to shift expenses between principal and income.

Ms. Sancimino argued that the challenged allocations were one-time fees stemming from litigation initiated by the petitioner, and that future administrative expenses are not expected to be allocated in the same manner.

After hearing oral arguments, the court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Compelling The Trustee Regarding Allocation Of Trustee'S Fees, Attorneys' Fees, Accountants' Fees And Investment Advisory Fees
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
